titleStmt.title: SII 24.563: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 563. (A.R. No. 101 of 1936-37.) NORTH AND WEST WALLS OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE DAŚĀVATĀRA TEMPLE

summary.p: Damaged. Records grant of lands in Śeṅguḍi and Aṇalai including house sites as nityāgnihōtra-vṛitti to Śrīraṅgarāja-Dīkshitar out of the tiruviḷaiyāṭṭam lands of the shrine of Tirumaṅgai-Āḻvār by Nārāyaṇasvāmin, the agent incharge of the latter shrine in the Daśāvatāra temple. The Jīyar was entitled to certain honours in the temple after daily worship and on the five festival days, in honour of Tirumaṅgai-Āḻvār. The details of date viz., Śaka ••••• pi, Uttarāyaṇa, Vṛishabha śu. 2, Monday, Rēvatī are irregular. Nārāyaṇa svāmin is perhaps identical with Nārāyaṇa-Jīyar referred to in No. 561 above If so, the date of this inscription will be Śaka 1639, Hēmaḷambi or 1640, Viḷambi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī [.] śālivāhana śakābdam pi samvatsaram Uttarāyaṇattu vṛṣabhaṉāyattu pūrva pakṣattu dvitiyaiyum Intu vāsara mum revati nakṣatramum śubhayoga śubhakaraṇamum petta Inta śubhadiṉa
ttil śrīcoḷamaṇḍalam Ubhayakāverimadhyaiyil tiruvaraṅkat tiruppatiyil daśā- vatāram tirumaṅkai Āḻvār saṉṉati śrīkāriyattukkuk kaṟttarāṉa śrīmannārāyaṇa svāmikaḷ Āḻvār niyamaṉap paṭikku Ittiruppatiyiliruk
kum daśāvatāram śrīraṅgarājadikṣitarukku Agnihotravṛtti dharmma śilāśāsanama paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi . Iṟṟaiṉāḷ Āḻvār tiruvuḷḷa mukantaruḷit tammuṭaiya tiruviḷaiyāṭṭamāṉa ceṅkuṭiyil cālaikaṭṭi Ādhānādiyāka Agniṣṭomam śrīraṅgarājadikṣitaraik koṇṭu kaiṅkaryyaṅkaṇṭaruḷi Avabhṛta puṇyakālattil tiyumukantaruḷa ceṅkuṭi ṭṭattil nañcai nilam mākāṇi yaraikkāṇiyum
yaṉṅkāṇi Oṉṟaraiyum Āka kāṇi nañcaikkāṇi Iraṇṭum puñcaiyil paṇṇacca nallūrppātaikku vaṭakku mutal tarattu Oṉṟum piṭāri koyilukku kiḻakku toṭṭam Oṉṟum ciṅkaṉ (cey) ceyttalait tiṭal Oṉṟum mel ciṟakil vaṭakku mutal Iraṇṭarai maṉaiyum cūranattam kīḻ ciṟakil teṟkku mutal Iraṇṭarai maṉaiyum Arccakamukena dhārāpūrvakamāka prasādittu Itaṉ vikāri samvatsaram vaiyyāci mātam tiruvaraṅkantiruppati daśā
vatāra svāmi sannadhi Atbhutadivya vimānattukku vaṭakku Āḻvār sannadhi parakāla puṣkaraṇikku meṟku Atbhuta tivya vimāna śālai kaṭṭi Āḻvār niyamaṉappaṭikku nirvighnamāka śrīraṅgarājadīkṣitaraik koṇṭu vaitika kaiṅkaryamum kaṇṭaruḷi vaṭa tirukāveriyil Avabhṛthamu(m)ṅkaṇṭaruḷi tadanantaram Āḻvār tiyum Ukantaruḷi tammuṭa tiruviḷaiyāṭṭam Aṇalaikkaṭṭaḷai vāstuśeṣam
nañcai veli nilattil śrīraṅgarājadīkṣitarukku Agnihotra vṛttiyāka 80 veli Oru ceyyum(k) kaṇakaṉ pāṭoṭi Or ceyyum Ākac ceyt talaitttiṭaluḷpaṭa nañcai Iraṇṭu ceyyum Arccaka mūlena dhārāpūrvakamāka śilāśāsanam paṇṇi prasādicca paṭiyiṉāle Aṇalaiyil Iraṇṭu ceyyum ceṅkuṭiyil Iraṇṭu ceyyum puñcaittaram Oṉṟum kulaittiṭal Oṉṟum brahmavāttalaittiṭalil Iraṇṭarai maṉaiyum cūranatta
m kiḻciṟakil teṟku mutal Iraṇṭarai maṉaiyum nityāgnihotraprattiyāka Ācandrārkkasthāyiyāka putra pautra pāramparaiyāka sarvamānyamāka Aṉūpavittuk koḷḷakkaṭavarākavum Ippaṭi [ Aṉubha] vikkumiṭa
ttu niddhyādyaṣṭa bhogateja svāmyaṅkaḷum dānādhi vinimayakrayaṅkaḷukkum yogyamāka Ācandrārkka sthādhiyāka putra pautra pāramparaiyāka jhanubhavittuk koḷḷakaṭavarākavum nittayappaṭi daśāvatā
rap perumāḷ tirumaṅkai Āḻvār sannadhiyil parimāṟṟam piṉ Āḻvār prasāda rūpam caṉṉati kaiṅkariyattile Āḻvār niyamittaruḷi Irukkuṟappaṭṭatu jiyyarukku Aruḷippāṭu mutala tirtthamāṉa piṉ Iraṇṭān tirtthamum
yippaṭi vyañanasahitamāka Iraṇṭupaṭi campātirttha prasādamum kaippiṭi Oṉṟum veḷayamum karaiccu carattik kuṟatu cāttuppaṭi Araippaṭiyum periya sannadhiyil la kṣminārāyaṇap perumāḷ
Oṉṟum nittiya kaṭṭaḷaiyākap peṟuvārākavum Āḻvār varuṣa tirunakṣatram tiru kāṟttikaic cāttumuṟai Utsavattilc caṉṉatiyil viśeṣa parimāṟṟam maṭatti lirukkiṟal vidham mutal tirtthamāṉappiṉ
Iraṇṭāntirtthamum cāttuppaṭiyum Aṟutippacca vaṭap parivaṭṭamum Iraṭṭatirumālaiyum kaippiṭiyum veḷayamu peṟuvārākavum periya caṉṉatiyilum tīrtthamum tirumālai parivaṭṭam Apayahastam kaippiṭiyum veḷayamum
peṟuvārākavum tirunakṣatram Añcuṉāḷum Āḻvār Amutu ceytaruḷiṉa tirttha prasādam tiruppaṇiyārattil viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu patiṉāṟiloṉṟum peṟuvāṟāka vum Ippaṭi Āḻvār niyamaṉappaṭikku
śrīmannārāyaṇa jiyyar śrīraṅgarāja dikṣitarukku Eḻutikkuṭutta dharmmam śilāśāsanam §
Intappaṭikku Āḻvār niyamaṉappaṭi śrīman=tārāyaṇajiyyar kai Eḻuttu I śrīpara kāla śrī I
Digital edition of SII 24.563 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
